title: Best Adapted Screenplay Predictions (2026 Oscars)
text: One Battle After Another by Paul Thomas Anderson leads the race for Best Adapted Screenplay. Anderson's adaptation has demonstrated strong momentum across guild awards and industry recognition. The prediction ranking includes: Maggie O'Farrell and Chloé Zhao for Hamnet; Clint Bentley and Greg Kwedar for Train Dreams; Will Tracy for Bugonia; and Guillermo del Toro for Frankenstein. According to Awards Editor Marcus Jones, One Battle After Another represents the dominant craft contender in this category. The film has proven its appeal across multiple voting bodies that overlap significantly with Academy voters. Its adapted screenplay has been consistently recognized throughout the awards season as a strong technical achievement. The category remains competitive, but Anderson's established track record combined with the film's broad support positions it as the safest prediction for this award.
